visual_description: A man in a dark shirt walks down a staircase in a dimly lit building. The camera follows him from behind as he moves through a large, open-plan office space filled with people in light-colored shirts and dark pants. The office has a modern design with glass partitions and a checkered floor pattern.
audio_description: The sound of footsteps on a hard surface, suggesting someone is walking.
